overview: Riva is a hyperlocal delivery platform connecting customers with local vendors and delivery partners. Customers browse products and stores, place orders, and track delivery live. Vendors manage multiple stores, products, and orders. Delivery partners pick up and deliver orders with live GPS tracking.
features: Multi-store vendor management with store switching
Pending vendor acceptance stage with 5-minute countdown
Live order tracking with GPS and map
Category-based product discovery (Stationery, Grocery, Fruits, Fashion, Toys)
Vendor analytics dashboard (earnings, orders, best sellers)
URL-based routing with persistent navigation state
